zh.lifeSummary: 當Henrick Persson於大約1546年出生在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可時，他的父親Per Eriksson27歲，母親Valborg Mattsdotter23歲。他於大約1569年與Anna Nilsdotter在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1570年在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henrick Persson于大约1546年出生在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可时，他的父亲Per Eriksson27岁，母亲Valborg Mattsdotter23岁。他于大约1569年与Anna Nilsdotter在瑞典諾波頓內德爾卡利可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1570年在瑞典諾波頓波利利斯布享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Persson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Anders, Erik, Lars, Erland, Lennart, Agnar, Arnell, Bjorn, Helmer, Hilma, Joakim.  German Kurt, Darrold, Hans, Mathias, Frieda, Oskar.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Per, vernacular shortened form of Peter . It is also established in Denmark and northern Germany. Compare Parson 3 and Person 1.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

variants.name: Person
meanings: Americanized form (and a very rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Persson or Pehrsson (see Pehrson ).
German: patronymic from the personal name   Peer  , Low German variant of   Peter  .

nameMeanings.name: Henrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kendrick
meanings: In modern use a transferred use of the surname, the origins of which are complex. The source in many cases is the Old Welsh personal name Cynwrig. This is of uncertain derivation: it may be composed of elements meaning ‘high, exalted’ + ‘hill’ or ‘summit’. The Scottish surname Ken(d)rick is a shortened form of MacKen(d)rick (Gaelic Mac Eanraig ‘son of Henry’); Scottish bearers are descended from a certain Henry MacNaughton, and the (Mac)Ken(d)ricks are a sept of Clan MacNaughton. As an English surname, Ken(d)rick is derived, at least in part, from the Middle English given name Cenric, in which two Old English personal names have fallen together: Cēnerīc (from cēne ‘keen’ + rīc ‘power’) and Cynerīc (from cyne ‘royal’ + rīc ‘power’). Cenric survived as a given name into the 17th century.

historicEvents.description: Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Henrick Persson was born about 1546, in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden, his father, Per Eriksson, was 27 and his mother, Valborg Mattsdotter, was 23. He married Anna Nilsdotter about 1569, in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1570, in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Sweden, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henrick Persson est né environ 1546, à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède, son père, Per Eriksson, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Valborg Mattsdotter, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anna Nilsdotter environ 1569, à Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1570, à Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suède, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henrick Persson um 1546 in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Per Eriksson 27 und seine Mutter Valborg Mattsdotter 23. Er hat um 1569 in Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Schweden Anna Nilsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1570 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henrick Persson è nato il circa 1546 nel Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia, il suo padre, Per Eriksson, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Valborg Mattsdotter, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anna Nilsdotter circa 1569, nel Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1570, nel Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Svezia, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henrick Perssonが約1546年にスウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスで生まれた時，父Per Erikssonは27歳，母Valborg Mattsdotterは23歳であった。約1569年にスウェーデンノルボッテンネデルカリックスでAnna Nilsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1570年にスウェーデンノルボッテンブoルジェルスブインで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henrick Persson(이)가 대략 1546년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Per Eriksson(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Valborg Mattsdotter(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1569년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 네더캘릭스에서 Anna Nilsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1570년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 브o르j스빈에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henrick Persson nasceu aproximadamente 1546, em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia, seu pai, Per Eriksson, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Valborg Mattsdotter, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Nilsdotter aproximadamente 1569, em Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1570, em Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suécia, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henrick Persson родился около 1546 г. в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция, его отцу по имени Per Eriksson было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Valborg Mattsdotter, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Nilsdotter около 1569 г. в местности недиркаликс, норрботтен, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1570 г. в местности бoрджелсбин, норрботтен, Швеция в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henrick Persson nació aproximadamente 1546, en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia, su papá, Per Eriksson, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Valborg Mattsdotter, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anna Nilsdotter aproximadamente 1569, en Nederkalix, Norrbotten, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1570, en Börjelsbyn, Norrbotten, Suecia, a la edad de 25 años.
